_meta.description: Application contract describing the real runtime behavior of the Gäld SaaS accounting application.

middleware_details.org: EnsureHasOrganization — resolves current org or redirects to /onboarding
middleware_details.org-2fa: EnsureOrganizationTwoFactor — enforces 2FA when org requires it
middleware_details.subscription: EnsureActiveSubscription — SaaS mode only, redirects to billing
middleware_details.api-org: EnsureApiOrganization — resolves org from Sanctum token

auth.registration_flow: POST /register → email verification → POST /onboarding (create org) → dashboard
auth.setup_wizard_flow: GET /setup (only if no Organization exists) → creates user + org in transaction → auto-verifies email → dashboard

ee_plugin_routes.note: These routes are loaded dynamically by GaeldEEServiceProvider via PluginServiceProvider when the gaeld-ee plugin is enabled.

steps.detail: InvoiceController@create renders Invoices/Create with customers, vatRates, suggestedNumber

steps.action: Fill form with customer, lines, dates
steps.detail: Client-side Zod validation, useUnsavedChanges guard, useClosedFiscalYear check
Validates customer_id, lines, amounts, dates, VAT rates
SyncInvoiceLinesAction handles 2-pass % discount calculation, Swiss 5ct rounding
Status Draft→Sent, posts journal entry via InvoiceAccountingService (multi-VAT debit/credit), dispatches InvoiceFinalizedEvent
InvoiceController@show renders Invoices/Show with full invoice data
GET /invoices/{id}/qr-pdf generates Swiss QR-bill PDF via sprain/swiss-qr-bill

steps.action: On invoice show page, click Record Payment
Enter amount, date, method, bank account

steps.detail: Creates InvoicePayment, posts journal entry (debit bank, credit receivable), updates invoice status to Paid if fully paid or Partial

steps.action: Navigate to /expenses/create (optionally via OCR receipt scan)
Fill expense form (or accept OCR prefill)
steps.detail: useClosedFiscalYear guard prevents posting to closed years
FileUploadService handles receipt upload to private disk

steps.action: PostExpenseAction posts journal entry via ExpenseService
steps.detail: Debit expense account, credit bank/payable, VatEntry Input, Swiss 5ct rounding

steps.action: BankImportService parses and creates BankTransaction records

steps.detail: QR reference=100pts, amount+name=90pts, heuristic=70pts for invoices; exact amount+vendor for expenses
Links to invoice (RecordPaymentAction) or expense (ExpenseReconciler) or manual journal entry (ContraAccountReconciler)

steps.action: Posts journal entry, marks transaction as reconciled
Review P&L summary, select result account, submit

steps.detail: Posts closing journal entries via LedgerService, creates legal archive with SHA-256 integrity, generates opening balances for next year
Prevents further posting to closed year periods

steps.action: Fill user + organization data in multi-step wizard
CompleteSetupAction creates user + org in transaction
steps.detail: Auto-sets email_verified_at, seeds Swiss chart of accounts via OrganizationSetupService
PayrollCalculator applies gross→net with Swiss deductions (AVS 5.3%, AC 1.1%, AANP 1%, LPP 7%), pro-rata for partial months

steps.action: PostPayrollAction posts journal entries per slip

scheduled_jobs.description: Generates invoices from active recurring templates
Sends payment reminders for overdue invoices
Records monthly depreciation for fixed assets

bugs_fixed.description: budgetSummary() used now()->month for months elapsed, ignoring the organization's fiscal_year_start and the display year. Past completed years showed only partial budget instead of full 12 months.
bugs_fixed.fix: Added computeMonthsElapsed() that resolves fiscal year start from Organization model, returns 12 for past years, and correctly calculates elapsed months for the current fiscal year.

bugs_fixed.description: suggestExpenses() did not exclude already-reconciled expenses. A Posted expense matched to a BankTransaction could be suggested again for a different transaction.
bugs_fixed.fix: Added whereNotIn filter excluding expense IDs that already appear in BankTransaction.matched_expense_id.

warnings.description: SwissDeductionService falls back to hardcoded 2026 defaults when no DeductionRate records exist. Silent Log::warning() only. Rates will become stale in future years.
warnings.recommendation: Add an admin notification or health check when using default rates.

warnings.description: BankAccount.balance is denormalized and updated via bcadd/bcsub in BankingService. No periodic reconciliation against the linked ledger account balance.
warnings.recommendation: Add a scheduled integrity check comparing denormalized balance to ledger account balance.
